name: Spanish Studies
note: A grade of C (2.0) or higher must be earned in all courses. The Spanish Studies major requires four courses beyond SPA-225 plus five interdisciplinary courses from an approved list. SPA-336/-338 Hispanic Life and Culture is recommended as one of the four. Application for the interdisciplinary courses must be made no later than Spring Term of the junior year.

sections.label: Four Courses Beyond Intermediate Spanish II
sections.description: Four courses beyond Intermediate Spanish II (SPA-225), with Hispanic Life and Culture (SPA-336/-338) recommended as one of the four.

sections.label: Five Interdisciplinary Courses
sections.description: Five courses from a departmentally approved list proposed by the student which exhibits internal coherence and relevance to the course work in Spanish.
